regions.name: Bangkok Metropolitan
regions.nameIt: กรุงเทพมหานคร
regions.bestTimeToVisit: Visit November to February for cooler, dry weather ideal for urban exploration.

regions.name: Central Plains
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to February offers the best weather for visiting temples and historical sites.

regions.name: Northern Thailand
regions.bestTimeToVisit: October to February provides cool mountain weather perfect for trekking and festivals.

regions.name: Northeastern Thailand (Isan)
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to February is ideal with dry, cool conditions for exploring temples and Mekong River sites.

regions.name: Eastern Thailand
regions.nameIt: ภาคตะวันออก
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to February offers pleasant weather for beach activities and island hopping.

regions.name: Western Thailand
regions.nameIt: ภาคตะวันตก
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to February provides cool, dry weather suitable for national park visits and hiking.

regions.name: Central Coast
regions.nameIt: ชายฝั่งกลาง
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to February is best for beach relaxation and water sports with calm seas.

regions.name: Southern Peninsula
regions.bestTimeToVisit: December to March offers the driest weather for island exploration and diving.

regions.name: Andaman Coast
regions.nameIt: ชายฝั่งอันดามัน
regions.bestTimeToVisit: November to April provides calm seas and sunny weather ideal for beach and island activities.
